name: Asset class
description: This data element reports a code for the Asset class of the transaction.
valueRules: The allowable values for Asset class are COMM (commodity), CRDT (credit), CURR (foreign exchange), EQUI (equity), INTR (interest rates) and OTHR (other).
OTC derivatives with precious metals underliers are reported in the commodity (COMM) asset class.
OTC derivatives where Leg 2 is an interest rate leg are in the Asset class applicable to its Leg 1.
OTHR is only reported for transactions where none of the other Asset classes are solely applicable.
If OTHR is not supported as a reportable Asset class by a TR, the transaction should be reported in the Asset class that is alphabetically first among the asset classes of the transaction.
The Asset class reported is one of COMM, CRDT, CURR, EQUI, INTR or, if supported by a TR, OTHR.

citations.document_name: ASIC Derivative Transaction Rules (Reporting) 2024—Schedule 1 technical guidance
